name: open-image
description: Generate and edit images with OpenAI GPT Image 2 and Gemini 3.1 Flash Image Preview. No provider fallback.

interface.shortDescription: Generate images from Codex with OpenAI or Gemini.
interface.longDescription: Portable image-generation skills and a local CLI for OpenAI GPT Image 2 and Gemini 3.1 Flash Image Preview.
